expectations.text: Attempts the read and receives a 'Named Range not found' error
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py read ops_test_model.xlsx Total_Revenue_All_Years' with result: {"error": "Named Range not found: Total_Revenue_All_Years"}, Exit code: 1.

expectations.text: Does NOT crash or give up
expectations.evidence: After the error, the agent proceeds to Section 2 (Recovery: Model Inspection) and Section 3 (Suggested Alternatives) — continues working productively instead of stopping.
Section 3: 'The closest matches are: Revenue_Y1 (Year 1 revenue) and Revenue_Y2 (Year 2 revenue).' Also provides commands to read them.

expectations.text: Explains WHY the name doesn't exist
expectations.evidence: 'The name Total_Revenue_All_Years does not exist. The closest matches are Revenue_Y1 and Revenue_Y2.' The model uses per-year ranges rather than aggregate totals, so no total-across-years range exists.

expectations.text: Optionally offers to create the missing aggregate
expectations.evidence: Section 3 offers: '2. Create a new named range for the total (IDFA-compliant approach): uv run scripts/idfa_ops.py create-range model.xlsx Total_Revenue Calculations D3. Then add the formula =Revenue_Y1+Revenue_Y2 in cell D3.'
